paragraph: Archaeological excavations at the ancient city of Troy have provided comp______ evidence that supports elements of the legendary accounts found in Homer's ep___ Using advanced tech________ such as ground-penetrating radar, researchers have identified mul_____ layers of settlement spanning nearly four mil______ The ear_____ phases reveal a prosperous trading center with exten____ fortifications and sophisticated water man_______ systems.
